data.description_suggestion: Receives and processes webhook events from Stripe payment service for business entity operations. Validates webhook signature and processes payment-related events (charges, disputes, refunds, etc.). Updates internal payment state and triggers corresponding business logic. Returns HTTP 200 on successful processing. Webhook events are idempotent and may be retried by Stripe.
